hypothesis: If XGBoost models are trained via ∆-learning to predict the difference between GFN1-xTB and DFT (PBE/HSE06) band gaps using the top 400 features from ST-135, RACs, and APRDF descriptors, then they will yield significantly lower prediction error for MOF band gaps than direct XGBoost models trained to predict DFT band gaps and will match or exceed the accuracy of MOFTransformer and CGCNN baselines.
